Description: Master = this instance launches the bundled Redis on this machine and connects to it locally (choose this for your first/only grid). Slave = this instance does NOT launch Redis; it connects to the master's Redis. Deploy one Master, then any number of Slaves.

Only used when Server Role is Slave. The LAN/public IP of the machine running the Master (and its Redis). You must also point THIS grid's ServerGrid.ServerOnly.json Redis URL at this same IP. Leave as 127.0.0.1 on the Master.
Sets ServerAdminPassword. This is ALSO the password AMP uses to connect to RCON, so it must be filled in or the console won't work. Use something strong.
The PUBLIC IPv4 address of this machine (SeamlessIP). ATLAS needs this even for a single grid. Find yours at whatismyip.com. Use 127.0.0.1 only for a LAN-only test.
X coordinate of this grid square within the map. For a single-grid server leave this at 0. It must match the cell you built in ServerGrid.json.
Y coordinate of this grid square. For a single-grid server leave this at 0.
Folder used to store this grid's saved world (AltSaveDirectoryName). Keep it unique per grid, e.g. 00 for grid 0,0.
Optional. Extra command-line flags appended to the end, e.g. -culture=en or -NoCrashDialog. Leave blank if unsure.
